face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">Locate position 1,500,000,000</span></font></div><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">on the hash ring</span></font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="295.75" x="269.62" y="5400" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;arcSize=6;fillColor=#b0e3e6;strokeColor=default;" value="<div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">Walk vnodes</span></font></div><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">(REPLICATION_FACTOR = 3)</span></font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="265" x="285" y="5610" style="font-size: 16px;">1st vnode: node-b#47</span></font></div><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">→ Physical: node-b</span></font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="265" x="718" y="5610" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;arcSize=6;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=default;" face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">2nd vnode: node-c#12</span></font></div><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">→ Physical: node-c</span></font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="265" x="718" y="5395" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="9" parent="1" 2</span></font></div><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">────────────</span></font></div><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">3rd vnode: node-a#89</span></font></div><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">→ Physical: node-a</span></font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="265" x="718" y="5195" face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">Assemble Response</span></font></div><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">────────────</span></font></div><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">NO DATA STORED!</span></font></div><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">Just routing information</span></font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="265" x="1130" y="5395" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="11" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;arcSize=6;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=default;" value="<div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">Response to Client</span></font></div><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">────────────</span></font></div><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">{</span></font></div><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">key: 'order_12345',</span></font></div><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">hash: ['node-c', 'node-a']</span></font></div><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">}</span></font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="180" width="320" x="1530" y="5365" as="geometry"
